segments.text: No water comes out. You turn it on, no water comes out. No water comes out of the shower.
No water is allowed to go into the washing machine for your dishes or for
your clothing. And I avoided all of that. Wait, they have sinks where no water comes out?
Sure, you have restrictors. When I say no water, very little water. You want to wash your hands,
right? And you turn on the sink and it's very little. Or you want to wash your beautiful hair,
right? And you stand under a shower. Then the suds never go. The water comes out very slowly.
I'm sure you've seen this. It usually takes place in new hotels and new homes.
Yeah, you take a drill and take the limiter out.
Well, you can, but now they make it so you can't do that. So they have a restrictor.

full_text: No water comes out. You turn it on, no water comes out. No water comes out of the shower. No water is allowed to go into the washing machine for your dishes or for your clothing. And I avoided all of that. Wait, they have sinks where no water comes out? Sure, you have restrictors. When I say no water, very little water. You want to wash your hands, right? And you turn on the sink and it's very little. Or you want to wash your beautiful hair, right? And you stand under a shower. Then the suds never go. The water comes out very slowly. I'm sure you've seen this. It usually takes place in new hotels and new homes. Yeah, you take a drill and take the limiter out. Well, you can, but now they make it so you can't do that. So they have a restrictor. It's called the restrictor.
